parameters.query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS plane_settings (
  user_id integer PRIMARY KEY,
  plane_url text NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  workspace_slug text NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  plane_token text NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  plane_user_id text NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
)

={{ $('Token result').first().json.action === 'save' ? "INSERT INTO plane_settings (user_id, plane_url, workspace_slug, plane_token, plane_user_id, updated_at) VALUES ($1::integer, $2, $3, $4, $5, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET plane_url=$2, workspace_slug=$3, plane_token=$4, plane_user_id=$5, updated_at=NOW() RETURNING 'saved'::text AS status" : "SELECT plane_url, workspace_slug, plane_token, plane_user_id FROM plane_settings WHERE user_id = $1::integer" }}

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Token result').first().json.action === 'save' ? [$('Token result').first().json.user_id, $('Token result').first().json.s_url, $('Token result').first().json.s_slug, $('Token result').first().json.s_token, $('Token result').first().json.s_userId] : [$('Token result').first().json.user_id] }}
